candidates.why: Gross sales line near top of income statement, but royalties are presented separately so this may be a gross component rather than the primary reported revenue line.

candidates.row_label: Share of income from investment in associate
candidates.why: Not revenue; non-operating/associate income.
Finance income is not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Discontinued Operations - Tax Impacts - Current Income/Expense
candidates.why: Tax line, not revenue.
Best match for the reported top-line revenue after royalties; appears at the top of the income statement as the main revenue line.
Other income is non-core and not top-line revenue.
Finance/other income, not sales revenue.
Finance-related, not revenue.
Tax line, not revenue.
Tax total, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Net Income - excluding  Extraordinary Items applicable to Common
candidates.why: Bottom-line earnings, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Transfer of accumulated other comprehensive Income on disposition
candidates.why: OCI reclassification, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Other Comprehensive Income - Net of Tax - Total
candidates.why: OCI total, not revenue.
Non-recurring item, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using a priority list rather than summing. 'Net Revenue' is the best top-line revenue label; 'Oil and gas sales' is included as fallback because labels may vary over time and royalties are shown separately.

candidates.why: Direct operating/production cost line directly below revenue; best match for cost of sales.
Could be an overhead/service component, but less clearly the primary cost of sales than 'Production costs'.

variables.notes: Selected the direct production cost line as COGS.

candidates.why: Explicit G&A overhead line; strongest SG&A match.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: SG&A component, but since an explicit populated G&A line exists, this is likely a breakdown and should not be added unless needed for coverage.
Could be operating overhead in some years, but may also relate to direct service costs; weaker SG&A match.
Could serve as R&D-like operating expense; per rule, if separately reported and not embedded in G&A, include it in XSGA as well so XSGA-XRD removes it.

variables.notes: OK. CR:c|high|misclassified. Selected explicit SG&A row 'General and administration'. Also included separately reported 'Exploration and business development costs' because it is an above-EBIT R&D-like operating expense and appears separate from G&A; this allows XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD to exclude it.

candidates.why: Best available dedicated R&D-like line; appears above operating result as an operating expense.

variables.notes: Mapped the dedicated above-EBIT development/exploration line as XRD.

candidates.why: Too broad because finance costs likely include non-interest items; less preferred than granular interest rows.
Primary recurring interest expense line; best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring lease-interest component that should be included with interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of the same lease-interest concept; avoid using this when the main line exists to prevent duplication.
Balance sheet liability, not interest expense.
Balance sheet liability, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used granular recurring interest components and excluded broad 'Finance costs' because it likely includes non-interest items such as fair value changes.

candidates.why: Equity subcomponent, not total/common book equity.
Direct shareholders' equity line; best BE match and excludes any separate NCI if present.
Also a strong total equity line; useful as alternate label over time.
Share count, not equity value.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

variables.notes: Priority list of owner equity labels. No separate non-controlling interest line is visible, so BE can use the shareholders' equity line directly.
No minority interest / non-controlling interest line appears on the provided balance sheet.
